headline: Oracle Joins IMSA Labs as Founding Partner to Accelerate AI and Motorsport Innovation
summary: Oracle and the International Motor Sports Association (IMSA) today announced Oracle as the Founding Partner of IMSA Labs, the formalized platform for continued innovation and collaboration between the motorsports sanctioning body and its automotive and technology partners. A cornerstone of the partnership is the launch of Oracle Cloud Innovation Studio, a new startup innovation program built on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). The program is designed to help startups move from concept to valid

headline: Mythics and Celonis Join Forces to Accelerate AI-Driven Oracle Transformations
summary: Mythics, a leading Oracle systems integrator and consulting firm, announced a strategic partnership with Celonis, the global leader in process intelligence. Together, the companies will help organizations eliminate process inefficiencies, reduce operational costs, and accelerate Oracle Cloud transformations by replacing assumption-based decision-making with real-time, data-driven insights.

headline: Why Is Arista Networks (ANET) Stock Trending Overnight?
summary: Arista Networks shares rose 8.76% during regular trading and moved slightly higher after hours, with the stock trading near its 52-week high.
